typeLine: Flagellant's Sulphur Flask of the Tortoise
explicitMods: Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Cloak of Flame
explicitMods: Reflects 100 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers
40% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
flavourText: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 9% increased Burning Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. If this ignites an enemy a large area of burning ground will be created under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
explicitMods:
Igniting Enemies creates Burning Ground, no more than once per second
Burning Ground deals 65% of Fire Damage per second of inflicted Ignite
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets a corpse, causing it to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. Cannot target corpses that have been created by skills.
explicitMods: Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 34.5% of the corpse's Maximum Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a crystal that pulses with cold for a duration. Each pulse applies a debuff to nearby enemies for a secondary duration which reduces life regeneration rate, and also inflicts Cold Exposure. When the crystal's duration ends, it explodes, dealing heavy cold damage to enemies around it.
explicitMods: Cold Exposure applies -15% to Cold Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a stationary electrical orb that strikes enemies in its area of effect with beams of lightning that can then split to hit more enemies. Modifiers to cast speed will increase how frequently it does this. Casting this skill again will replace the previous orb.
explicitMods: Strikes every 2.55 seconds, and when you use a Lightning Skill near the Orb
Strikes every 0.50 seconds while Channelling a Lightning Skill near the Orb
Beams Split towards targets within a base radius of 3.5 metres

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 241% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%

should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 77% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.

name: Immortal Flesh
explicitMods: -45 Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
40% increased Armour while not Ignited, Frozen or Shocked
flavourText: "She begged the Earth to spare her Son;
Out of love the Earth agreed.
To the other Elements she did not speak
And out of spite They plotted."
- Berek and the Untamed
